items.title: Goldman economist, uncowed by Trump attack, plans to 'keep doing' as before
items.description: Chief U.S. Economist David Mericle's defense of his team's work came a day after Trump in a social media post said Goldman Chief Executive David Solomon should "not bother running a major financial institution" and lambasted the bank's economics research.  The report Trump attacked, published August 10, estimated that U.S. consumers so far have borne less than a quarter of the cost of Trump's tariffs but that share would rise to two-thirds if the tariffs play out in the same way they had previously.

items.title: 5 Overlooked Stocks That Are Soaring Even More Than AI
CoreWeave's AI Demand Surges But Expansion Spending Cuts Into Profitability
items.description: CoreWeave (NASDAQ: CRWV) posted strong Q2 results, with surging revenue & backlog driven by AI demand. Expansion plans may lead to near-term costs.

items.title: Goldman Sachs Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
items.description: Over the past year, Goldman Sachs has delivered standout gains, surpassing the broader market, while analysts remain fairly confident in its strong future potential.
